activities.title: Call one friend you haven't spoken to in 6+ months
activities.description: Scroll your call log, pick a name that gives you a small pang. 15 minutes. No agenda.

activities.title: Read 20 pages of the book on your bedside
activities.description: The one you've been meaning to. No new book. The one already there. 30 minutes.

activities.title: Take a 20-minute walk outside without your phone
activities.description: Leave it on the counter. Walk anywhere. Notice the light, the people, the air. Come back.

activities.title: Clear one drawer that has been bothering you
activities.description: The kitchen junk drawer, the bathroom under-sink, the cable drawer. Empty, sort, return. 15 min.

activities.title: Cook one recipe you bookmarked but never made
activities.description: Open your bookmarks, pick whichever you saved earliest. Buy the missing ingredient or improvise.

activities.title: Watch one talk from a real-life craft you don't do
activities.description: Glassblowing, falconry, bookbinding, beekeeping. YouTube. 30 minutes of someone who loves their thing.

activities.title: Sit on your balcony with chai and stare at the sky for 20 min
activities.description: Bring just chai. No phone, no book. Watch the sky change. That's the whole activity.

activities.title: Write a thank-you message to a mentor or old boss
activities.description: Three sentences. Specific about what they did for you. Send before you overthink it.

activities.title: 10-minute full-body stretch with a YouTube video
activities.description: Search 'morning stretch 10 min'. Pick first result. Do it. Notice the difference.

activities.title: Half-day at a cafe with a single side project
activities.description: Laptop, notebook, headphones, one project, no Slack. Three hours. The thing you keep saying you'll start.

activities.title: Plan one weekend trip with a friend on a real call
activities.description: Not WhatsApp. Pick up the phone, agree on dates and place in one call. Book one thing today.

activities.title: Browse old photos on your phone for 20 min
activities.description: Scroll back two years. Send one to the person in it. Delete duplicates while you're there.
